landing.heroTitle: Free English self-study platform with AI grading
landing.heroSubtitle: Cambridge, IELTS, SAT, competency assessment, and more — structured learning paths, mock exams, and instant AI feedback on writing and speaking.
landing.programsSubtitle: One platform for school English, international exams, and university readiness.
landing.programCambridgeDesc: Starters, Movers, Flyers, KET, and PET — structured YLE to B1 pathways with mock tests.
landing.programIeltsDesc: Reading, Listening, Writing, and Speaking — band-focused practice with AI feedback.
landing.programSatDesc: Reading & Writing and Math tracks — practice tests and skill-building for US college admissions.
landing.programCompetencyDesc: English, reasoning, and problem-solving — get ready for national competency exams (ĐGNL).
landing.featuresSubtitle: Serious exam prep and daily learning — without paying for a tutor.
landing.highlight2: AI scores writing and speaking instantly
landing.highlight3: Wow Lessons, mocks, and clear progress
landing.feature1Desc: Switch goals without switching apps — Cambridge for school English, IELTS for study abroad, SAT and competency prep when you need them.
landing.feature2Desc: Step-by-step units and lessons that unlock as skills grow — clear progress from first steps to exam level.
landing.feature3Desc: Submit writing tasks and speaking recordings — detailed feedback on grammar, vocabulary, fluency, and pronunciation.
landing.feature4Desc: Exam-style mocks across programs, score tracking over time, and a clear view of how ready you are.
landing.feature5Desc: Earn XP, unlock badges, and build daily study habits — learning feels rewarding, not like a chore.
landing.feature6Desc: No hidden fees, no paywalls on core learning. Create a free account and start today.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Create a free account in under a minute — pick your program and take your first lesson.

journey.pageSubtitle: Follow the pathway from Starters through PET — see what you have completed and what comes next.
journey.mockSectionSubtitle: Major exam checkpoints for your level
journey.mockEmptyDescription: Take a Cambridge mock test at this level to unlock readiness insights and milestone progress on your journey.
journey.milestonesSubtitle: Celebrate progress across your Cambridge journey
journey.milestoneFirstWritingDesc: Complete a mock test with a writing section.
journey.milestoneFirstSpeakingDesc: Complete a mock test with a speaking section.
journey.milestoneFirstGoldMockDesc: Complete a Gold-certified Cambridge mock test.
journey.milestoneKetReadyDesc: Strong Flyers progress prepares you for KET.
journey.milestonePetReadyDesc: Strong KET progress prepares you for PET.

milestoneLevelCompleteDesc.pet: You finished the PET learning pathway.

achievements.pageSubtitle: Celebrate meaningful progress across lessons, mocks, writing, speaking, and your Cambridge journey.

achievements.nextEmptyDescription: Explore lessons and mock tests to unlock your next achievement.
achievements.encouragement: Every lesson and mock test moves you closer to your next milestone. Start today!
achievements.emptyDescription: Try a different filter or keep learning — new Cambridge achievements unlock as you progress.
achievements.relatedMilestone: Keep going — your next achievement is within reach.
achievements.progressRemaining: Complete {count} more to unlock this achievement
achievements.toastCelebration: Great work — your Cambridge progress is paying off.
achievements.journeySubtitle: Milestones linked to your Cambridge learning path
achievements.mockCenterSubtitle: Earn these by completing mock exams and Gold-certified tests
achievements.unitExplorerDesc: Complete every lesson in one unit.
achievements.assessmentChampionDesc: Score 90% or higher on a mock test.
achievements.firstWritingDesc: Submit your first Writing AI task.
achievements.firstSpeakingDesc: Submit your first Speaking AI task.
achievements.completedStartersDesc: Finish all Starters lessons in your program.
achievements.completedMoversDesc: Finish all Movers lessons in your program.
achievements.completedFlyersDesc: Finish all Flyers lessons in your program.
achievements.ketReadyDesc: Reach 80% completion on the KET pathway.
achievements.petReadyDesc: Reach 80% completion on the PET pathway.
achievements.cambridgeExcellenceDesc: Score 95% or higher on a mock test.

profile.nextMilestoneFallback: Keep learning to unlock your next milestone
profile.snapshotSubtitle: Your current status at a glance
profile.snapshotEmptyNote: Start learning to build your Cambridge portfolio.
profile.learningSubtitle: Where you are on your Cambridge path
profile.learningEmptyDescription: Choose a Cambridge level and complete your first lesson to begin tracking progress.
profile.mockEmptyDescription: Take a Cambridge mock test to discover your strengths and identify areas for improvement before exam day.
profile.writingEmptyDescription: Writing is one of the fastest ways to improve your Cambridge score. Submit your first task to receive AI feedback on vocabulary, grammar, and structure.
profile.speakingEmptyTitle: Build speaking confidence step by step
profile.speakingEmptyDescription: Practice speaking regularly to build confidence and improve fluency. Record your first speaking response to get AI feedback on pronunciation and vocabulary.
profile.certificationsSubtitle: Credentials earned on your Cambridge journey
profile.certificationsEmptyDescription: Complete Gold mock tests and Cambridge milestones to earn certifications.
profile.journeyEmptyDescription: Select a Cambridge program to unlock your visual learning journey — see levels, milestones, and what comes next.
profile.goalsSubtitle: Recommended next steps for your portfolio
profile.goalsEmptyTitle: Personal goals unlock as you learn
profile.goalsEmptyDescription: Complete lessons and mock tests to unlock personalised Cambridge goals tailored to your progress.
profile.goalNextMockDesc: Stay exam-ready with your next Cambridge mock test.

report.reportSubtitle: A clear summary of Cambridge learning progress for parents and guardians
report.previewSubtitle: Share a professional summary of learning progress. Download a PDF or print this page.
report.sectionEmpty: No data yet for this section
report.gettingStartedTitle: Your child's Cambridge journey is just beginning
report.gettingStartedBody: As lessons, mock tests, and practice tasks are completed, this report will fill with meaningful progress insights.
report.learningEmpty: No lessons completed yet. Starting the learning path is the best first step.
report.mockEmpty: No mock tests completed yet. A practice mock helps measure exam readiness.
report.writingEmpty: No writing practice yet. Writing tasks build vocabulary and structure skills.
report.speakingEmpty: No speaking practice yet. Regular speaking builds confidence and fluency.
report.skillsEmpty: Skill insights appear after mock tests and lessons with tagged content.
report.achievementsEmpty: No achievements unlocked yet. They appear as learning milestones are reached.
report.journeyEmpty: Select a Cambridge program to begin the visual learning journey.
report.nextStepsEmpty: Complete a lesson or mock test to unlock personalised next steps.
report.consistencyConsistent: Your child is learning consistently — great habit building!
report.consistencyReturning: Your child has been learning recently. A short daily session keeps momentum.
report.consistencyGettingStarted: Your child is getting started. The first lessons unlock progress tracking.
report.trendImproving: Scores are trending upward — keep up the great work.
report.trendStable: Performance is steady. Focus on weak areas for the next boost.
report.trendBuilding: Building a foundation — early practice counts.
report.nextContinueLessonReason: Picking up where they left off maintains learning momentum.
report.nextStartLearningReason: Beginning the Cambridge pathway unlocks progress and achievements.
report.nextTakeMockReason: Mock tests show strengths and areas to focus before exam day.
report.nextPracticeWritingReason: Writing is one of the fastest ways to improve Cambridge scores.
report.nextReviewWritingReason: Focused practice on this area will strengthen writing scores.
report.nextPracticeSpeakingReason: Regular speaking practice builds confidence for the exam.
report.nextImproveFluencyReason: Fluency improves with short, regular speaking sessions.
report.nextReviewGrammarReason: Extra practice here will strengthen overall performance.

learning.title: Wow Lessons
learning.subtitle: Complete lessons to unlock the next one
learning.noLevelTitle: Choose your Cambridge level to begin
learning.noLevelDesc: Pick the level that matches your goal — lessons unlock step by step as you master each unit.

learning.skillNoContent: No lessons for this skill yet

learning.journeySubtitle: Open a unit for skill tabs — locked lessons stay in a collapsible list
learning.lockedUnitsSubtitle: Complete earlier units to unlock these
learning.unlockAllBanner: Content test mode: all lessons in this level are unlocked. Disable NEXT_PUBLIC_UNLOCK_ALL_LESSONS for sequential learning in production.
learning.lockedHint: Complete the previous lesson with mastery ≥ 3 to unlock this section
learning.skillFilterHidden: The recommended next lesson is in {skill} — hidden by the current filter
learning.reviewSubtitle: Extra practice to build confidence before moving on
learning.reviewWeakSkillHint: {skill} could use a bit more practice
learning.reviewReasonLowMastery: Mastery is still developing — a quick review will help
learning.reviewReasonCompletedNotMastered: Completed but not yet proficient — worth another pass
learning.reviewReasonWeakAccuracy: Accuracy could improve — review this lesson
learning.reviewReasonNeedsPractice: Multiple attempts — reviewing will build confidence

lesson.lockedDescription: Complete earlier lessons to unlock this one.
lesson.practiceLimitDescription: Free plan includes 1 lesson per day. Upgrade to Pro or VIP for unlimited practice.
lesson.emptyDescription: This lesson has no practice content yet. Return to the path and pick another lesson.
lesson.exercisesSubtitle: Complete each exercise to progress through this lesson
lesson.heroContinueHint: Start with the suggested exercise to finish this lesson faster.

lesson.reviewExercisesSubtitle: Choose an exercise to review or retry

completeSummary.title: You completed this lesson!
completeSummary.performanceNote: Accuracy and mastery reflect your latest saved results.
completeSummary.recommendationExercisesNeedReview: You finished every exercise. Review {count} exercise(s) before moving on.
completeSummary.recommendationLessonNeedsReview: Lesson complete — a quick review will help this stick before you continue.
completeSummary.recommendationFinalQuizLow: Lesson complete. Review the final quiz to remember it better.
completeSummary.recommendationGreatJob: Great work — you can continue to the next lesson.
completeSummary.reviewSectionSubtitle: Review these before the next lesson
completeSummary.finalExerciseSubtitle: This is the score for «{title}» — not your whole-lesson score.
completeSummary.lessonLevelScoreNote: 100% lesson means you completed every exercise in this lesson.
completeSummary.victorySubtitle: Great work — you finished the whole lesson.
completeSummary.recommendationSupportGreatJob: You can continue your Cambridge journey now.
completeSummary.recommendationSupportReview: Review the exercises below to feel more confident before moving on.
completeSummary.recommendationSupportFinalQuiz: The final quiz score does not change your lesson completion progress.
completeSummary.recommendationSupportLessonReview: A quick review will help this stick better.
completeSummary.finalExerciseDetailsLabel: Last exercise details (one exercise only — not the whole-lesson score)

vocabulary.title: Lesson vocabulary
vocabulary.unsupportedSpeech: Speech is not supported in this browser. You can still browse the vocabulary table.

ai.transcriptPlaceholder: Speak into the microphone to see the transcript...
ai.transcriptUnsupported: Real-time transcription is not supported in this browser
ai.micAccessDenied: Microphone access was blocked. Click the lock icon in the address bar → Microphone → Allow, then reload.
ai.micNotFound: No microphone found. Check that a mic is connected and enabled in system privacy settings.
ai.micInsecureContext: Microphone only works on https:// or http://localhost — not on a LAN IP address.
ai.micNotSupported: Recording is not supported in this browser. Open the lesson in Chrome or Edge (not an IDE preview pane).
ai.micRecorderUnsupported: This browser does not support the required audio format. Try Chrome or Edge.
ai.micUnknownError: Could not access the microphone. Check browser and system microphone permissions.

placement.title: Placement Tests
placement.subtitle: Choose a placement test for your current program
placement.advisoryNote: Results are advisory only: Cambridge score, shields, and a suggested level. You choose your learning level in Settings.

placement.pickerEmpty: No placement tests available for this program
placement.notAvailable: Placement test is not available yet
placement.comingSoonDesc: We are preparing full Cambridge content before opening placement tests. Choose your learning level in Settings for now.
placement.suggestedLevelNote: This is only a suggestion — you can pick a different level in Settings

hub.title: Cambridge Mock Tests
hub.subtitle: Auto-scored practice mocks — Listening & Reading/Writing only. Speaking and Writing are not included.

hub.emptyDescription: Practice mocks will appear here as they become available for your Cambridge level. Check back soon or explore your learning path.

analytics.title: Grammar and vocabulary performance from your latest attempt.
analytics.noAttemptTitle: Learning insights unlock after your first attempt
analytics.noAttemptMessage: Complete this mock test to see grammar and vocabulary insights based on your answers.
analytics.insufficientMetadataTitle: Insights are expanding with Cambridge content
analytics.insufficientMetadataMessage: Learning insights become available as Cambridge content is completed and tagged for grammar and vocabulary analysis. Your score and skill breakdown are still available above.

format.practiceMockDescription: A practice subset for revision — not a full official Cambridge exam.
format.noSpeakingWriting: Speaking and Writing are not included in this practice mock.
format.aboutSubtitle: What is included in this practice test

complete.title: Mock test complete!
complete.victorySubtitle: Here is how you did on this practice test.
complete.shieldsNote: Shield estimates are practice indicators, not official Cambridge scores.
complete.performanceNote: Scores reflect your latest completed attempt on this test.
complete.recommendationGreatJob: Great work — keep building your Cambridge skills!
complete.recommendationSolid: Solid effort — a quick review will help this stick.
complete.recommendationNeedsReview: Good try — review the weaker sections before your next attempt.
complete.supportGreatJob: You can retake anytime or continue on your learning path.
complete.supportSolid: Focus on the skills below, then try again when ready.
complete.supportNeedsReview: Practice the suggested areas, then retake to improve your score.

review.title: Worth reviewing
review.subtitle: These skills scored below your target on the last attempt.
review.retakeHint: Retake the test after a short review to build confidence.

take.reviewListSubtitle: Tap a question to see your answer again.
take.completeModeSubtitle: Test complete — review your results below.

subscriptions.pageSubtitle: Every tier gets full course and practice access. Free is limited to 1 lesson per day; Pro and VIP are unlimited. AI grading limits stay the same by plan.

cambridge.description: Cambridge YLE, KET, PET, FCE prep with AI-scored mock tests.

speakingWriting.name: Camba Speaking & Writing

pricing.subscribeToast: Payments coming soon. Contact Camba to subscribe.

checkout.title: Pay with VietQR
checkout.description: Scan the QR code or transfer to activate {tier} — {program}.
checkout.scanHint: Transfer the exact amount and memo so your plan activates automatically.
checkout.paid: Payment successful! Your plan is now active.
checkout.expired: This payment order has expired. Please create a new one.

limitDialog.freeDescription: You've used today's free AI session. Subscribe to Pro or VIP for more daily AI practice.
limitDialog.proDescription: You've used all 5 AI sessions today. Upgrade to VIP for more daily AI practice.
limitDialog.vipDescription: You've used all 10 AI sessions today. Come back tomorrow to continue with AI.
